channel.title: Random Operators and Stochastic Equations
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Random Operators and Stochastic Equations

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Backward stochastic differential equations driven by G-Lévy process with double reflexions
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2021

item.title: Existence results for coupled systems of fractional stochastic differential equations involving Hilfer derivatives
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2022

item.title: Quadratic-exponential growth backward stochastic Volterra integral equations with jumps and associated dynamic risk measure
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2023

item.title: Smith’s reduction for random processes and application for stochastic differential equations
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2024-2024

item.title: Stochastic volatility modeling via mixed fractional Brownian motion
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2025-2001

item.title: Averaging principle for RBDSDEs with Poisson jumps
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2025-2002

item.title: Riemann–Liouville fractional stochastic evolution equations driven by mixed sub-fractional Brownian motion
item.description: Article by Mokhtaria Boutlilis, Abdeldjebbar Kandouci DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rose-2025-2003
